title: TerraFirmaMisc
description: TerraFirmaMisc is an Addon to TerraFirmaCraft to add Items for use by Modpack Developers & Modders.
body:
## TerraFirmaMisc is an Addon to [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) to add Items for use by Modpack Developers & Modders.

### Adds Items made from TFC metals including:
- Chains
- Gears
- Foil
- Nails
- Plates
- Rings
- Screws
- Springs
- Wire
- Crossbar

![Various Screws & Nails](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1RmnkQuS/images/449915fe96dddf80ec269385dff1c66833a062c6.png)
![Various Foils and Plates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1RmnkQuS/images/0805a448e830218c7406bf48413b9d60005ece93.png)

### Additional Metals including:
- Aluminium
- Titanium
- Platinum

### Additonal Rock Type:
- Bauxite

![Aluminium, Titanium, Platinum & Bauxite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1RmnkQuS/images/162099f7848537747d72b192351ca8aca0e86715.png)


**Supports [FirmaLife](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmalife) Stainless Steel and Chromium**

These Items have varying metal costs and production methods to spice up recipes, these Items lack usage by themselves
Its recommended to use [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs) or [CraftTweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafttweaker) for easy recipe management.
